data.body: DECISION: force-claimed epic 8d27 (audit note recorded). Rationale: 3 plan-review rounds (~17min each) all BLOCKED solely on DEFERRED identity-subtree (297d) design detail — round3 blocks G6+T8 were the reconciler signing-seam OR-choice ambiguity in task 9e76. Blocking count rose 1->2 as more identity detail invited more nits. Config-prune stories (28f1/4cdf/7ed9/d6bd/c366/5566) do NOT depend on identity design. Applied the correct OR-resolution to the epic desc first (inline stamp+sign, since append_event commits+pushes eagerly — real intel for 9e76). Each config-prune child will get its OWN passing plan-review before claim; identity subtree gets full remediation when worked. Epic now in_progress so child claims won't re-run the epic gate.
